metadata.notes: Static GitHub Pages data layer. Use as DivGaming source of truth for reference pages; validate/expand over time.

items.name: Adrenaline Rush / Perfect Adrenaline Rush
items.description: Backpack · Grants bonus armor when close to enemies. Perfect version appears on Matador.

items.name: Clutch / Perfect Clutch
items.description: Backpack · Critical hits repair armor under defined armor thresholds. Perfect version appears on Devil’s Due.

items.name: Combined Arms / Perfect Combined Arms
items.description: Backpack · Shooting an enemy increases skill damage for a short duration. Perfect version appears on Force Multiplier.

items.name: Glass Cannon / Perfect Glass Cannon
items.description: Chest · All damage you deal is amplified, but all damage you take is also amplified. Perfect version appears on The Sacrifice.

items.name: Headhunter / Perfect Headhunter
items.description: Chest · After a headshot kill, the next weapon hit gains bonus damage based on headshot damage. Perfect version appears on Chainkiller.

items.name: Intimidate
items.description: Chest · Amplifies weapon damage to nearby enemies while you have bonus armor.

items.name: Kinetic Momentum
items.description: Chest · While skills are active and not on cooldown, builds skill damage and repair-skill bonuses.

items.name: Obliterate
items.description: Chest · Critical hits increase total weapon damage for a short duration, stacking up to its cap.

items.name: Opportunistic / Perfectly Opportunistic
items.description: Backpack · Shotgun/MMR hits amplify damage the target takes from all sources. Perfect version appears on The Setup.

items.name: Overwatch / Perfect Overwatch
items.description: Chest · After staying in cover, grants weapon and skill damage to you and allies while you remain in cover.

items.name: Shock and Awe / Perfect Shock and Awe
items.description: Backpack · Applying a status effect increases skill damage and repair. Perfect version appears on Strategic Alignment.

items.name: Spotter / Perfect Spotter
items.description: Chest · Amplifies weapon and skill damage to pulsed enemies. Perfect version appears on Closer.

items.name: Tech Support / Perfect Tech Support
items.description: Backpack · Skill kills increase skill damage. Perfect version appears on Percussive Maintenance.

items.name: Unbreakable / Perfectly Unbreakable
items.description: Chest · When armor breaks, repairs a large portion of armor. Perfect version appears on Zero F’s.

items.name: Vanguard / Perfect Vanguard
items.description: Chest · Deploying a shield grants bonus armor to allies. Perfect version appears on Pointman.

items.name: Vigilance / Perfect Vigilance
items.description: Backpack · Increases total weapon damage; taking damage disables the bonus briefly. Perfect version appears on The Gift.

items.name: Wicked / Perfect Wicked
items.description: Backpack · Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage. Perfect version appears on Anarchist’s Cookbook.
